# The Future of Fraud Fighting – The eBook

Calling all Fraud Fighters: do you know what the future holds in stopping fraud and growing your business?

Machine learning-based solutions are leading…

![Sift Author Logo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20504%20504'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sift Trust and Safety Team

May 28, 2015

![black-dot](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/black-dot.svg)

![Press-Release-Tile-Image-Color-Pills\_Blue](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Calling all Fraud Fighters: do you know what the future holds in stopping fraud and growing your business?

Machine learning-based solutions are leading the charge against fake accounts, credit card fraud, and chargebacks. Fraud fighters worldwide are learning to harness the power of big data and customizing artificial intelligence in order to predict fraud before it happens.

Sift Science is offering a free ebook that introduces machine learning technology and how it’s used in fraud detection services. Doubtless you’ve heard about machine learning, but do you know how it’s used in the real world? I’ll bet that you’ve interacted with machine learning and benefitted from its predictions without even knowing it. Don’t believe me? Check out the ebook to find out more!

![machine learning book](/app/uploads/2015/05/machine-learning-book.png)
